recommended_external_plugins.name: superpowers
recommended_external_plugins.purpose: Planning, test-driven development, debugging, code review, and branch-finishing workflows for coding agents.
recommended_external_plugins.use_when: Recommend when the owner uses a supported agent platform and the plugin is not already visible in the current agent environment or project platform config.

platforms.install_action: Install Superpowers from the Codex plugin marketplace.
detection_evidence: Superpowers appears in installed Codex plugins or available skills.
Project or environment guidance already says Superpowers is installed.
platforms.verification: Confirm Superpowers appears in Codex plugins or available skills.

detection_evidence: Claude Code plugin list includes Superpowers.
Superpowers skills are already available in the Claude Code session.
platforms.verification: Confirm Claude Code lists the Superpowers plugin or a fresh session recognizes Superpowers.

platforms.install_action: Add "superpowers@git+https://github.com/obra/superpowers.git" to the plugin array in opencode.json.
detection_evidence: OpenCode skill list includes Superpowers skills.
platforms.verification: Confirm OpenCode loads the plugin and lists the Superpowers skills.
